steps.title: Identify the relationship between sentences
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim about what the study investigated—the relationship between nonprofit spending and performance. The second sentence provides the specific details: which metrics were measured (overhead spending and event attendance), how many organizations (22,328), and the methodology. The blank must transition from this general claim to these specific details.

steps.title: Apply the transition signal
steps.content: Specifically is the transition word that introduces precise details elaborating on a general statement. The other options create wrong relationships: Thus marks a consequence, In addition introduces a separate point, and By comparison sets up a contrast—none of which fit here. That matches choice D — D is correct.
